case_title: KIN M WONG VS. STANLEY HOM

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,201.26 FILED BY WONG, KIN M AS TO DEFENDANT HOM, STANLEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-07-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-07-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, KIN M RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOM, STANLEY $3,201.26 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,201.26 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00) SERVED APR-30-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HOM, STANLEY
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, KIN M
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-03-2013 ORDERED DESTROYED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID YANG. FILED BY WONG, KIN M HOM, STANLEY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-07-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-07-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID YANG. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID YANG. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT HOM, STANLEY
